title: Monsoon Beef Noodles
description: A hearty beef noodle dish perfect for a cold day. The juicy beef and savory gravy make this a standout recipe.

ingredients.name: beef strips
ingredients.notes: such as flank steak or ribeye

ingredients.name: noodles
ingredients.notes: such as udon or egg noodles

instructions: Cook noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat beef broth in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add beef strips and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove beef from pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add monsoon spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add gravy, beef broth, and flour to the pan. Stir to combine.
Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add beef back to the pan and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Stir in juicy beef broth and cook for 1 minute.
Serve beef and gravy over cooked noodles.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
